Route and location data for Kenosha visit (1hr 15min drive), job sites, and personal stops per PROMPT.md
Food diary logs needed for 90-day saturated fat, cholesterol intake, and red meat reduction analysis for Dr. Brewer cholesterol follow-up per PROMPT.md and TOOLS.md
Grocery ordering and price checking needed for Sophie custody weekend meal planning and grocery cost estimation per PROMPT.md and TOOLS.md
SMS message history with Sophie and family needed for checking what Sophie has mentioned about weekend plans per PROMPT.md and TOOLS.md
Payment sending/receiving and transaction verification needed for full financial picture across all accounts per TOOLS.md
Restaurant and local service search needed for Sophie weekend meal options and finding reliable no-fuss dining per PROMPT.md and TOOLS.md
Follows Sophie and fishing accounts; needed for checking Sophie activity and interests for custody weekend planning per TOOLS.md
